summary: Frontend change-verification for Ultras Hub: (1) 'عاجل' ticker fully removed, (2) Arabic brand 'الترا هب' removed and English ULTRAS HUB wordmark + FOOTBALL STUDIO subtitle + new red logo SVG present in header, (3) News slider loads 14 items with mixed Arabic (الشرق الأوسط, العربية, صحيفة الرياضية, Kooora, يلاكورة) and BBC sources — recent World Cup 2026 content. Nav switches all 7 pages. MARCA card → info-modal with translate-btn href containing translate.google.com/translate and u=...marca. Arabic (كووورة) card shows visit-btn (kooora.com) as expected. Matches page shows 11 .scorebug after ~15s. Live page beIN SPORTS 1 opens modal; alt-player-btn toggles iframe from youtube embed → piped.video. No fixed empty bottom bar; layout OK.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: one news slide shows source label 'عاجل' (this is a news outlet/source name, NOT the removed breaking-news ticker). The DOM ticker (data-testid=news-ticker and #ticker-move) is confirmed absent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested changes verified on https://global-football-news.preview.emergentagent.com. Ticker removed, Arabic brand gone (only English ULTRAS HUB wordmark + FOOTBALL STUDIO), Google-News-based Arabic feed loads with 14 items. Regressions pass: nav 7 pages, MARCA translate-btn (href sl=auto&tl=ar&u=...marca), Arabic visit-btn, matches scorebugs (11), live alt-player toggle (yt→piped).
